name: Program Final Firmware
info:
Flashes the production firmware .hex to the STM32 on the DUT. Third and final stage — flashed only after all tests pass, so the shipped unit runs the production code.

**Prerequisites:**
- Pi has openocd installed (`sudo apt install openocd`)
- ST-Link V2/V3 connected via USB
- SWD lines wired to DUT (SWCLK, SWDIO, GND, NRST, VTref)

**Configuration (per instance):**
- `hex_path` — Absolute path to the .hex file to flash
- `openocd_target` — openocd target config, default 'target/stm32f0x.cfg' (change to stm32g0x.cfg for G0, etc.)
- `openocd_interface` — interface config, default 'interface/stlink-v2.cfg'

**Input:** any msg triggers the flash.
**Output:** msg.payload = { success, stage, hex_path, elapsed_ms, exit_code, timestamp, log }

name: Build openocd cmd
